session.user: Run `ruff format src/erk/tui/actions/palette.py src/erk/tui/commands/registry.py src/erk/tui/screens/plan_input_screen.py` and report results.
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff format command to check the formatting of those TUI files.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff format src/erk/tui/actions/palette.py src/erk/tui/commands/registry.py src/erk/tui/screens/plan_input_screen.py

session.assistant:
ruff format reformatted 3 files:
- `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/tui/actions/palette.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/tui/commands/registry.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/tui/screens/plan_input_screen.py`
All three files had formatting changes applied.
